description_long: This object depicts a highly stylized adult human figure with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a twisted, contorted posture. The figure's arms are stretched dramatically above the head, merging into long, ribbon-like extensions that curve and spiral. The head is realistic and proportionate, with detailed facial features, while the body and limbs are abstracted and appear to flow into one another. The clothing is form-fitting, resembling a jumpsuit or bodysuit, and the feet are clad in shoes with a distinct sole. The overall appearance is surreal, blending realistic human anatomy with abstract, fluid forms.
description: A surreal adult figure with a realistic head and face, elongated limbs, and a twisted, ribbon-like body in a form-fitting outfit.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the front, with the head turned slightly to the side and both arms stretched upward, merging into long, flowing extensions.
description_view_1: A side view highlights the extreme elongation and spiral of the arms, as well as the contorted, crouched posture of the legs.
description_view_2: From the back, the merging of the arms into a single ribbon-like structure is visible, and the bent legs are prominent.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the twisting, serpentine quality of the arms and the side profile of the head and body.
attribute_posture: crouching with arms stretched and twisted overhead
